name: Ashfield Venter
description: Where the volcanic vents open, something breathes. Not alive — not exactly. A column of superheated ash and sulfur that moves with intent, drawn toward mortal body heat. Scholars debate whether it's a creature or a phenomenon. The people it's killed don't have an opinion.
behavior: Slow, relentless approach. Burns everything it touches. Cannot be fought with physical weapons — only World attunement or running. Drawn to concentrations of people. Disappears at dawn.
